installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm --filter frontend build

git.ignoreCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm dlx turbo-ignore
